# Savage Fantasy

> A world-class gritty fantasy colony simulation built on Bevy 0.18.1, featuring reactive systems, mysterious exploration, and high architectural integrity.

## Project Intelligence (Core Rules & Guards)
- [Constitution (GEMINI.md)](GEMINI.md): Foundation mandates and AI protocols.
- [Architecture Decision Records (ADR)](docs/superpowers/adr/README.md): Records of significant architectural choices and their rationales.
- [Architectural Guards Registry](docs/superpowers/ARCHITECTURE_GUARDS.md): Detailed map of 29 automated patterns and tests.
- [Architectural Guards (tests/architecture.rs)](tests/architecture.rs): Entry point for the 29 automated tests.
- [SOP: Bevy 0.18.1 Patterns](docs/superpowers/patterns/bevy_018_standards.md): Standards for Hooks, Hierarchy, and Reactivity.
- [ADR 0004: Procedural Generation](docs/superpowers/adr/0004-procedural-world-generation.md): Rules for Noise, Global Smooth Meshes, Biome Blending, Water Layer, and Premium PBR Lighting (CSM, SSAO, Bloom).
- [ADR 0005: Hexagonal Grid Transition](docs/superpowers/adr/0005-hexagonal-grid-transition.md): Transition from square grid to axial hexagonal grid.
- [ADR 0006: Reactive Relocation Pipeline](docs/superpowers/adr/0006-reactive-relocation-pipeline.md): Non-destructive auto-healing for faction placements.
- **Editor Phases**: State-based rendering logic (`Shape`, `Factions`, `Landscape`, `Sediments`, `Height3D`). Early phases use flat unlit meshes, while `Height3D` uses full elevation and PBR.
- [SOP: Reactive Faction Relocation](docs/superpowers/patterns/reactive_faction_relocation.md): Multi-phase reactive logic for entity positioning.
- [SOP: A River Routing](docs/superpowers/patterns/a_river_routing.md): Pathfinding-based river generation on terraced terrain.
- [SOP: Zenith Navigator](docs/superpowers/patterns/zenith_navigator.md): Standards for asynchronous, reactive pathfinding.
- [Design: Advanced Terrain Generation](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-11-advanced-terrain-gen-design.md): Sharp ridges, pass masks, and terraced plateaus logic.
- [Plan: Advanced Terrain Implementation](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-11-advanced-terrain-gen.md): Technical steps for the unified TerrainConfig inspector.
- [Design: Procedural Rivers](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-12-pathfinding-rivers-design.md): Dijkstra-based river routing and mud banks.
- [Design: River Carving & Fixes](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-13-river-carving-fixes.md): Physical channels, bank smoothing, and water mesh refactor.
- [Plan: Procedural Rivers](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-12-procedural-rivers.md): Step-by-step implementation guide for the river system.
- [Plan: River Carving & Fixes](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-river-carving-fixes.md): Implementation guide for physical river channels.
- [Plan: Premium PBR Lighting](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-09-premium-pbr-lighting.md): Implementation of the 4-layer cinematic lighting system.
- **Visual Stability**: Resolved "Gray Screen" by consolidating UI and World rendering into a single Camera3d and implementing TAA for SSAO compatibility.

## Narrative & Design Docs
- [Dark Narrative Design](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-the-dark-narrative-design.md): Vision and atmosphere specifications.
- [Foundations & Technical Plan](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-foundations-and-ant-farm.md): Initial project setup and core systems.
- [Pawn Details](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-03-pawn-details.md): Internal logic for settlers (Hunger, Morale).
- [Interaction & UI Plan](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-03-ui-and-interaction.md): Reactive interface and user feedback systems.
- [Design: Procedural Generation Overhaul](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-09-procedural-generation-overhaul-design.md): Details of the hybrid Voronoi/Whittaker/Stamp system.
- [Plan: Procedural Generation Overhaul](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-09-procedural-generation-overhaul.md): Step-by-step implementation guide for the overhaul.
- [Plan: 3D Verticality & Navigation](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-09-3d-verticality-and-navigation.md): Implementation of 3D heights and slope-aware 2.5D navigation.

## External Intelligence (Bevy 0.18.1)
- [Bevy Documentation Index](https://bevyengine.org/llms.txt): Primary map for Bevy docs.
- [Bevy Migration 0.17 to 0.18](https://bevyengine.org/learn/migration-guides/0.17-to-0.18/): Critical API changes.

## Optional & Metadata
- [Project Commit History](.git): Historical context for architectural decisions.
- [Architecture Details (tests/architecture_mod/)](tests/architecture_mod/): Deep dive into modular guard implementations.
